task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app and navigate to the 555 timer calculator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Electrical Calculations' app open, specifically on a page or tool for '555 timer' calculations.

task_completion.description: Select Monostable mode for the 555 timer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A toggle, dropdown, or tab for 'Monostable' mode is visibly selected or active on the 555 timer calculator screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the resistor (R) value of 470 kΩ
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '470' is entered in the Resistor input field, and the unit is set to 'kΩ' (kilo-ohms).

task_completion.description: Enter the capacitor (C) value of 100 µF
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '100' is entered in the Capacitor input field, and the unit is set to 'µF' (microfarads).
The app displays the calculated result for the pulse width/time, which should be '51.7' (seconds).

task_completion.description: Save the calculated numeric value to the specified result file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor screen showing the value '51.7' being written to or saved in the file path '/sdcard/tasks/555_timer_monostable/result.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Electrical Calculations app to find the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the GUI of the 'Electrical Calculations' app, rather than using a web browser, Python script, or terminal calculator to find the answer.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the app calculation
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of the app displaying the result (51.7) before the agent writes it to the text file. The agent should not just immediately open a terminal and echo '51.7' without using the app.

integrity.description: The agent entered the exact inputs requested
integrity.visual_evidence: The app screen must show R=470 kΩ and C=100 µF. The agent should not manipulate the inputs to force a specific output or use different units that mathematically yield the same result but violate the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected calculated pulse width is 51.7 seconds. The formula for a 555 timer in Monostable mode is T = 1.1 × R × C. With R = 470 kΩ (470,000 Ω) and C = 100 µF (0.0001 F), T = 51.7 seconds. The result must be saved to /sdcard/tasks/555_timer_monostable/result.txt.
